description: Unified gateway to 100+ LLMs (Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, Llama, Mistral, DeepSeek, Qwen) via one OpenAI-compatible endpoint.

chat.notes: OpenAI-compatible. Pass `model` in body (e.g. anthropic/claude-3.5-sonnet, openai/gpt-4o, meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct). Real cost varies per model — placeholder flat fee until per-token reconciliation lands.

completions.notes: Legacy text completions for non-chat models.

models.notes: List all 100+ available models with pricing and context length.

credits.notes: OpenRouter account credit balance (operator-side, not Axon balance).
